en.event_tips_agent_activate: VEN successfully paired with PCE and is now managed. Pair with agent.deactivate to track workload lifecycle. Filter by status=success or status=failure to detect pairing failures.
en.event_tips_agent_clone_detected: PCE detected two VENs with duplicate identities (cloned host scenario). Immediate investigation required — this can indicate unauthorized duplication. Pair with agent.activate_clone to see the clone activation.
en.event_tips_agent_deactivate: VEN removed from PCE management (unpair or decommission). Pair with agent.activate for lifecycle tracking and workloads.unpair for the workload-level event that usually accompanies deactivation.
en.event_tips_agent_goodbye: VEN-initiated disconnect before shutdown or restart. Pair with agent.service_not_available to distinguish clean shutdowns from failures. Absence of goodbye before a service_not_available event indicates an unclean failure.
en.event_tips_agent_refresh_policy: VEN fetched a fresh copy of its policy from PCE. High-frequency during provisioning; suppress with a severity filter in steady-state. No sub-variants.
en.event_tips_agent_service_not_available: VEN became unreachable (crash, host down, network cut). Watch alongside agent.goodbye — if goodbye did not precede this event, the failure was unclean. No sub-variants.
en.event_tips_agent_suspend: Enforcement paused on the workload; policy rules no longer applied. A workload in suspended state accepts all traffic — alert on this event. Check agent.activate and agent.deactivate for lifecycle context.
en.event_tips_agent_tampering: VEN binary or config file was modified outside of approved channels — an integrity violation. High-priority alert; this is a security incident indicator. No sub-variants; no status/severity filter needed.
en.event_tips_all: Matches every event regardless of type. Best used as a catch-all or for testing. Prefer specific event types to reduce noise; filter by category or actor for targeted monitoring.
en.event_tips_api_key_create: A new API key was issued. High-sensitivity event — unauthorized key creation grants persistent API access. Pair with api_key.delete for key lifecycle. Filter by actor to track who issued keys.
en.event_tips_api_key_delete: An API key was revoked. Pair with api_key.create for full key lifecycle. Unexpected deletions (especially of service account keys) may indicate account takeover or sabotage.
en.event_tips_cluster_update: PCE cluster configuration was modified. Rare in steady-state — alert on unexpected changes. No sub-variants. Use an actor advanced matcher to track who made the change.
en.event_tips_enforcement_boundary_create: An Enforcement Boundary (Selective Enforcement deny rule) was created. Affects all workloads in scope after provisioning. Alert on unexpected creation. Pair with enforcement_boundary.delete for lifecycle tracking.
en.event_tips_enforcement_boundary_delete: An Enforcement Boundary was removed. Removing a boundary widens selective enforcement coverage. Alert on deletions in production environments. Pair with enforcement_boundary.create for lifecycle.
en.event_tips_firewall_settings_update: Global firewall settings were changed (e.g., logging mode, default deny rules). High-impact event — changes apply system-wide. No sub-variants or related lifecycle events. Alert on any unexpected change.
en.event_tips_lost_agent_found: A VEN that was previously unreachable has reconnected. Often follows agent.service_not_available. Use to close incidents. Alert severity: informational (recovery event). No sub-variants.
en.event_tips_nen_degraded: NEN is in a degraded state and may not be enforcing policy correctly — an escalation of network_enforcement_node.missed_heartbeats. Immediate action required; network devices may operate without up-to-date policy.
en.event_tips_nen_missed_heartbeats: NEN missed expected heartbeats — early warning before full degradation. Pair with network_enforcement_node.degraded for progression tracking. Alert early to preempt policy enforcement failures on network devices.
en.event_tips_request_authentication_failed: API or UI authentication attempt rejected (invalid credentials, expired token, missing API key). Filter by actor IP for brute-force detection. Pair with user.authenticate for the full authentication picture.
en.event_tips_request_authorization_failed: Authenticated user attempted to access a resource beyond their role permissions. Alert on repeated failures — may indicate privilege escalation attempts. No sub-variants.
en.event_tips_rule_set_create: A new Rule Set was created. Changes take effect only after sec_policy.create (provisioning). Pair with rule_set.update and rule_set.delete to track the full policy lifecycle. Monitor actor for unauthorized policy authoring.
en.event_tips_rule_set_delete: A Rule Set was deleted — irreversible once provisioned. Alert on unexpected deletions; this removes a logical grouping of security rules. Pair with rule_set.create and rule_set.update for full lifecycle.
en.event_tips_rule_set_update: An existing Rule Set was modified. Changes are draft until provisioned via sec_policy.create. Pair with rule_set.create and rule_set.delete. Use status=failure to catch failed updates.
en.event_tips_sec_policy_create: A new policy version was provisioned and pushed to all VENs — the 'commit' event. All preceding rule and rule-set changes take effect here. Alert on unexpected provisioning (off-hours, unknown actor). No sub-variants.
en.event_tips_sec_rule_create: An individual security rule was created within a Rule Set. Draft until provisioned. Pair with sec_rule.update and sec_rule.delete, and sec_policy.create for the provisioning trigger.
en.event_tips_sec_rule_delete: An individual security rule was deleted. Deleting rules widens allowed traffic once provisioned. Always pair with a corresponding sec_policy.create watch to know when deletions take effect.
en.event_tips_sec_rule_update: An existing security rule was modified. Draft until provisioned. Pair with sec_rule.create and sec_rule.delete. Use status=failure to detect authoring errors or permission issues.
en.event_tips_system_task_agent_missed_hear: PCE's scheduled check found VENs that missed expected heartbeats — a leading indicator before full disconnection. Watch alongside system_task.agent_offline_check to track progression from missed to offline.
en.event_tips_system_task_agent_offline_che: PCE's scheduled check found VENs confirmed offline. More definitive than system_task.agent_missed_heartbeats_check. Alert here for SLA-impacting incidents; use missed_heartbeats for early warning.
en.event_tips_user_authenticate: Covers all authentication attempts (success and failure). Filter by status=failure to detect brute force. Pairs with user.sign_in (fires only on success) and request.authentication_failed (API-level failures).
en.event_tips_user_login_session_terminated: Session ended by timeout or admin revocation — not a voluntary sign-out. Alert on admin-revoked sessions for security visibility. Pair with user.sign_out to distinguish voluntary vs forced termination.
en.event_tips_user_pce_session_terminated: PCE server terminated the session (e.g., PCE restart, maintenance). Different from user-initiated sign-out. No sub-variants. Monitor during maintenance windows or unexpected PCE restarts.
en.event_tips_user_sign_in: Fires only on successful console/API sign-in. For failed attempts use user.authenticate with status=failure or request.authentication_failed. Pair with user.sign_out and user.login_session_terminated for full session tracking.
en.event_tips_user_sign_out: User explicitly signed out of PCE. Pair with user.sign_in for session lifecycle. Distinguish from user.login_session_terminated (timeout/admin revoke) and user.pce_session_terminated (server-side termination).
en.event_tips_workloads_unpair: One or more workloads were unmanaged from PCE (VEN removed). Usually accompanies agent.deactivate. Alert on bulk unpairing (high count) — may indicate a configuration error or unauthorized decommission.

en.rpt_draft_actions_aab_verify_intent: Confirm boundary crossing was intentional; otherwise add boundary deny or scope rule.

en.rpt_guidance_audit_mod03_actions: Verify changes are tied to approved tickets; investigate anomalous actors or timing.
en.rpt_guidance_audit_mod03_how: Each row is a change event with actor, time, and target. Cluster by actor or ruleset to spot patterns.
en.rpt_guidance_audit_mod03_purpose: Track policy changes and lifecycle events across rulesets.
en.rpt_guidance_audit_mod03_signals: Off-hours changes, mass deletes, unauthorized actor, policy churn spikes.
en.rpt_guidance_audit_mod04_actions: Open IR ticket; pull full PCE audit log for chain; verify with VEN telemetry.
en.rpt_guidance_audit_mod04_how: Correlation chains are time-windowed multi-event sequences with shared actor or workload.
en.rpt_guidance_audit_mod04_purpose: Correlate suspicious events with policy changes and VEN activity to surface investigation stories.
en.rpt_guidance_audit_mod04_signals: Auth-failure → policy-change chains; agent tamper → traffic blip; mass-delete → blocked-flow surge.
en.rpt_guidance_mod02_actions: Author allow rules for legitimate PB flows; investigate blocked flows for attacker activity or misconfiguration.
en.rpt_guidance_mod02_how: Compare allowed vs PB share. PB does not mean a rule is staged — it means no matching allow exists and only visibility mode is hiding the block.
en.rpt_guidance_mod02_purpose: Show how observed flows split among allow / block / potentially blocked policy decisions, segmented per profile.
en.rpt_guidance_mod02_signals: A high potentially_blocked share means coverage gaps. A high blocked share signals attempted disallowed traffic.
en.rpt_guidance_mod03_actions: Build candidate allow rules; or accept default-deny impact; or investigate as suspicious.
en.rpt_guidance_mod03_how: Each row is a label-pair / port that lacks coverage. Higher volume + critical destination = higher remediation priority.
en.rpt_guidance_mod03_purpose: Surface flows with no matching allow rule that would be blocked under default-deny enforcement.
en.rpt_guidance_mod03_signals: High count of PB uncovered flows; flows targeting crown-jewel labels; flows from unmanaged sources.
en.rpt_guidance_mod04_actions: Quarantine or restrict; convert legitimate admin flows into named allow rules; investigate the rest.
en.rpt_guidance_mod04_how: Each row is a workload pair using a high-risk port. Flag if not in your allowed admin-tooling baseline.
en.rpt_guidance_mod04_purpose: Identify exposure to ransomware-relevant ports and protocols (SMB/RDP/SSH/etc).
en.rpt_guidance_mod04_signals: Internet-facing or unmanaged sources reaching critical-port destinations.
en.rpt_guidance_mod07_actions: Convert legitimate cells into label-based allow rules; investigate unexpected high-volume crossings.
en.rpt_guidance_mod07_how: Read along rows = source group, columns = destination group. Cell intensity reflects flow volume.
en.rpt_guidance_mod07_purpose: Map source-label → destination-label → service crossings to expose dependency structure.
en.rpt_guidance_mod07_signals: Unexpected env crossings (prod ↔ dev), unknown labels, app pairs lacking justification.
en.rpt_guidance_mod08_actions: Install VEN where feasible; document and accept exceptions; tighten boundary rules around unmanaged peers.
en.rpt_guidance_mod08_how: Each row is an unmanaged IP and its observed peers, ports, and label hits.
en.rpt_guidance_mod08_purpose: List unmanaged hosts (no VEN) participating in observed flows.
en.rpt_guidance_mod08_signals: Unmanaged sources accessing crown-jewel apps; high-volume unmanaged egress; unmanaged peers in critical environments.
en.rpt_guidance_mod13_actions: Convert PB into named allows; resolve unmanaged dependencies; then move app to selective enforcement.
en.rpt_guidance_mod13_how: Higher PB count = more flows that would be blocked. Higher allowed share with named rules = more ready.
en.rpt_guidance_mod13_purpose: Estimate enforcement readiness per app/env: how much would shifting to default-deny break vs protect.
en.rpt_guidance_mod13_signals: Low ready-to-enforce share; high PB exposure; unmanaged dependencies blocking enforcement.
en.rpt_guidance_mod15_actions: Cut the highest-impact hops via allow rules or boundary deny; isolate crown jewels.
en.rpt_guidance_mod15_how: Path length, port mix, and crossings between sensitive labels indicate blast-radius risk.
en.rpt_guidance_mod15_purpose: Show east-west paths an attacker could traverse after initial foothold.
en.rpt_guidance_mod15_signals: Long chains spanning environments; PB-heavy hops; risky-port chains (SMB/RDP).
en.rpt_guidance_mod_change_impact_actions: Investigate regressions; document improvements; correlate with audit policy changes.
en.rpt_guidance_mod_change_impact_how: Each KPI shows previous vs current and direction (improved / regressed / unchanged).
en.rpt_guidance_mod_change_impact_purpose: Show how key risk metrics changed since the previous report run.
en.rpt_guidance_mod_change_impact_signals: Big regressions in PB exposure, lateral paths; or improvements after recent policy changes.
en.rpt_guidance_mod_draft_actions_actions: Review the active allow rule and the override-deny boundary; tighten or remove as needed.
en.rpt_guidance_mod_draft_actions_how: Override Deny: current policy allows but draft would block. Allowed Across Boundary: flows crossing environment boundaries.
en.rpt_guidance_mod_draft_actions_purpose: Surface flows where draft policy decisions need human review or remediation.
en.rpt_guidance_mod_draft_actions_signals: Any override_deny or allowed_across_boundary flows — these represent policy intent gaps.
en.rpt_guidance_mod_ringfence_actions: Author candidate allows; add boundary deny for cross-env exceptions; resolve unmanaged dependencies.
en.rpt_guidance_mod_ringfence_how: Each candidate rule is a src_label → dst_label → port triple ready for review.
en.rpt_guidance_mod_ringfence_purpose: Map per-app dependencies and propose label-based ringfence rules.
en.rpt_guidance_mod_ringfence_signals: High cross-app or cross-env flows lacking allow rules; unknown labels in dependencies.
en.rpt_guidance_pu_mod03_actions: Disable then remove after a verification period; or replace with tighter rules if needed.
en.rpt_guidance_pu_mod03_how: Each row is a rule with last-hit timestamp and hit count over the query window.
en.rpt_guidance_pu_mod03_purpose: Identify unused (zero-hit) policy rules that are candidates for cleanup.
en.rpt_guidance_pu_mod03_signals: Rules unused for >30 days; broad-scope rules with zero hits (over-permissive but ineffective).
en.rpt_guidance_pu_mod04_actions: Tighten rule scope; remove redundant denies; investigate bypasses.
en.rpt_guidance_pu_mod04_how: Effective ratio = blocked flows matching deny scope / total flows in scope.
en.rpt_guidance_pu_mod04_purpose: Quantify how effective deny rules are: what they actually blocked vs intended scope.
en.rpt_guidance_pu_mod04_signals: Deny rules with zero hits (possibly redundant); deny rules being bypassed (low effective ratio).
en.rpt_guidance_ven_lost_heartbeat_actions: Check VEN connectivity to PCE; restart VEN service; escalate if critical workload affected.
en.rpt_guidance_ven_lost_heartbeat_how: Lost <24h: likely transient. Lost 24-48h: requires investigation. Duration and criticality determine urgency.
en.rpt_guidance_ven_lost_heartbeat_purpose: Identify VENs that lost contact recently but may still be recoverable.
en.rpt_guidance_ven_lost_heartbeat_signals: Multiple VENs lost in the same time window; critical workloads affected; recurring pattern.
en.rpt_guidance_ven_offline_actions: Restart VEN or re-enroll; if persistent, flag the workload as unmanaged in policy planning.
en.rpt_guidance_ven_offline_how: Offline = no contact > heartbeat threshold. Lost <24h is recoverable; >48h needs intervention.
en.rpt_guidance_ven_offline_purpose: List VENs that are offline or have lost recent heartbeat — these are segmentation blind spots.
en.rpt_guidance_ven_offline_signals: Offline VENs on critical workloads; long lost-heartbeat duration; clustered offline failures.

en.rule_b001_rec_critical_cross_env: CRITICAL: Cross-environment flows on critical ports with explicit allow rules detected. Remove or tightly scope these allow rules immediately. No cross-environment traffic should be permitted on lateral movement ports without a documented exception process. Ports involved: {named_ports}.
en.rule_b001_rec_cross_subnet_allowed: Cross-subnet flows on {named_ports} indicate unscoped management access or potential lateral movement. Restrict allow rules to: (1) authorised jump-host / bastion IPs only, (2) specific management VLAN ranges. Same-subnet flows ({n_same_subnet}) may be legitimate Windows admin — verify source IPs and scope rules accordingly. Apply Illumio rules with explicit source IP / label constraints.
en.rule_b001_rec_cross_subnet_pb: Cross-subnet flows on critical ports have no allow rule (potentially_blocked) — no policy covers these paths; they flow only because VEN is in test mode. Move destination workloads to selective or full enforcement to activate default-deny.
en.rule_b001_rec_pb_cross_env: CRITICAL: Cross-environment flows detected with no allow rule (potentially_blocked). No explicit policy permits this traffic — it flows only because workloads are in test mode. Move workloads to enforced mode to activate default-deny and block these paths immediately. Investigate why this cross-env traffic exists on: {named_ports}.
en.rule_b001_rec_same_subnet_allowed: Same-subnet flows on critical ports are typical for Windows server administration (RDP to nearby servers, SMB file shares, WinRM remote management). Recommended actions: (1) Verify each source IP is an authorised admin system or jump host, (2) Scope Illumio allow rules to specific source IPs rather than allowing all same-subnet access — this prevents lateral movement if any same-subnet host is compromised, (3) Confirm SMB 445 and RPC 135 are not used for general file sharing across workloads.
en.rule_b001_rec_same_subnet_pb: Same-subnet traffic on critical ports in test mode only. Low immediate risk — verify source IPs are authorised admin systems, then move workloads to enforced mode. Consider scoping allow rules to specific admin IPs rather than subnet-wide.
en.rule_b002_rec: 1) Verify each allowed flow has a documented business justification. 2) Block TeamViewer (5938) and VNC (5900/5901) unless required for specific admin workflows — replace with MFA-protected jump servers. 3) If NetBIOS (137-139) is allowed, migrate to SMBv3 over 445 with encryption. 4) Create Illumio deny rules for these ports from all non-admin workloads.
en.rule_b003_rec: 1) Prioritize moving workloads with potentially_blocked flows to enforced mode — start with the highest-risk ports (SSH, NFS). 2) Review the 'potentially_blocked' flows to ensure no legitimate traffic will break when enforcement is applied. 3) Create allow rules for verified legitimate traffic before switching to enforced mode. 4) Set a deadline for enforcement — prolonged test mode leaves the network exposed.
en.rule_b004_rec: 1) Identify each unmanaged source IP — are they network devices, legacy servers, or shadow IT? 2) Deploy VEN agents on servers that should be managed. 3) For network devices that can't run a VEN, use IP lists and enforcement boundaries to control their access. 4) Create explicit deny rules for any unmanaged-to-managed path that isn't required.
en.rule_b005_rec: 1) Focus first on critical tiers: databases, identity infrastructure (AD/LDAP), and externally-facing workloads. 2) Use Illumio's Explorer to identify top unruled flows and create allow rules for verified traffic. 3) Set a target coverage of >{threshold}% within 30 days. 4) Enable enforcement gradually — start with ring-fencing high-value assets, then expand to general workloads.
en.rule_b006_rec_allowed: 1) Investigate the top source IPs — check for exploit tools, unexpected SSH sessions, or RDP brute-force. 2) Remove or tightly scope the allow rules driving the high-fan-out flows. 3) Ring-fence high-value assets (databases, domain controllers) to limit blast radius.
en.rule_b006_rec_pb: 1) Investigate the top source IPs — check for exploit tools, unexpected SSH sessions, or RDP brute-force. 2) Move workloads to enforced mode — no allow rules exist for these paths; default-deny will block them upon enforcement. 3) Ring-fence high-value assets (databases, domain controllers) to limit blast radius.
en.rule_b007_rec: 1) Cross-reference flagged accounts with HR/IT records — are these admin accounts or regular users? 2) Check authentication logs for failed login attempts or impossible-travel alerts. 3) For admin accounts, enforce just-in-time access and MFA for lateral sessions. 4) Create Illumio user-based rules to limit which destinations each role can access. 5) If compromise is suspected, rotate credentials immediately and isolate the workload.
en.rule_b008_rec: 1) Verify the top bandwidth consumers — are they backup servers, replication, or database sync? Document expected high-volume flows. 2) For unexplained transfers, check if the source is a compromised workload exfiltrating data to an external or lateral destination. 3) Consider implementing bandwidth-aware rules or QoS policies for known high-volume services. 4) Set up Illumio monitoring alerts for sustained anomalous volume.
en.rule_b009_rec: 1) Audit each cross-env flow pair — document which ones are expected (e.g., Production monitoring pulling from Staging). 2) Create explicit Illumio rules for approved cross-env paths with specific port restrictions. 3) Block all other cross-env flows, especially database ports (see L004) and admin protocols (SSH, RDP). 4) Use Illumio environment labels consistently to enforce isolation boundaries.
en.rule_high_blocked_desc: High volume of blocked traffic detected.
en.rule_high_blocked_rec: Review the top blocked flows and verify whether Policy needs adjustment.
en.rule_l001_rec: Immediately disable Telnet (port 23) and FTP (ports 20/21). Replace with SSH (22) or SFTP. Cleartext credentials can be captured by any attacker with network access, enabling trivial lateral movement.
en.rule_l002_rec: Block NetBIOS (137-138), LLMNR (5355), and SSDP (1900) at the segmentation layer. These protocols serve no legitimate role in modern micro-segmented environments and are used almost exclusively for network reconnaissance and credential poisoning attacks (e.g., Responder / Inveigh).
en.rule_l003_rec: Database ports should only be reachable from their direct application tier (typically 1-2 app labels). Use Illumio rule-sets to restrict db access to approved app labels only. Wide database exposure is the primary post-exploitation data exfiltration path after lateral movement succeeds.
en.rule_l004_rec: Enforce strict environment isolation for all database ports. No Dev/Test/Staging application should have direct access to Production databases. Use read replicas or API gateways as the cross-environment interface, never direct DB ports.
en.rule_l005_rec_allowed: Restrict Kerberos (88) and LDAP (389/636) to domain-joined workloads only. Remove or tightly scope allow rules permitting broad identity-port access. No application tier should query LDAP directly — use a service account wrapper.
en.rule_l005_rec_pb: These flows have no allow rule — move workloads to enforced mode so default-deny blocks them. Before enforcing, create allow rules only for legitimate LDAP consumers (domain-joined workloads). No application tier should query LDAP directly — use a service account wrapper.
en.rule_l006_rec: Reduce lateral-port connectivity between application tiers using Illumio rule-sets. Each application should only be able to reach its direct dependencies — not transitively reach the entire network. Prioritise isolating the top pivot apps listed in evidence.
en.rule_l007_rec: Unmanaged hosts should NEVER directly reach database, identity, or Windows management ports. Options: (1) Onboard the hosts to PCE immediately, (2) Add explicit deny rules for unmanaged sources on these ports, (3) Investigate whether these are attacker-controlled hosts or shadow IT. Priority: verify the top source IPs are known/authorised assets.
en.rule_l008_rec: Move workloads from visibility/test mode to selective or full enforcement. Until enforcement is active, 'potentially_blocked' flows are live attack paths — no allow rule covers them; only enforced mode's default-deny will block them. Check enforcement mode in PCE for the destination apps: {top_apps}.
en.rule_l009_rec: Investigate all managed-to-unmanaged outbound flows above the threshold. Legitimate outbound traffic (internet APIs, CDN) should be explicitly allowed and scoped to known destination IPs or ranges. Apply an outbound allowlist policy and deny all other external destinations. Top suspicious destinations (by bytes): {top_dst_fmt}.
en.rule_l010_rec: CRITICAL: Lateral movement ports (SMB 445, RDP 3389, WinRM 5985/5986, RPC 135) must NEVER be allowed across environment boundaries. Implement deny rules at the environment boundary level immediately. This represents an active lateral movement path between environments that an attacker can exploit to escalate from low-security to high-security zones.
en.rule_pce_health_rec: Check PCE service status and network connectivity.
en.rule_r01_desc: Flows currently allowed but a draft deny rule would block them once provisioned.
en.rule_r01_rec: Review and provision the draft deny rules, or add explicit allow rules before provisioning to avoid unexpected traffic disruption.
en.rule_r02_desc: Override deny rule present; cannot be overridden by any allow rule.
en.rule_r02_rec: Override deny rules take precedence over all allow rules. Verify each override deny is intentional before provisioning.
en.rule_r03_desc: VEN in visibility/test mode and a deny boundary draft exists for this flow.
en.rule_r03_rec: Move workloads to enforced mode to activate the boundary deny. Flows are currently traversable only because VENs are in test/visibility mode.
en.rule_r04_desc: Allow rule overrides a regular deny. Verify this is intentional.
en.rule_r04_rec: Confirm that cross-boundary allow rules are intentional and tightly scoped. Consider whether a more restrictive rule can meet the business requirement.
en.rule_r05_desc: Aggregated list of workload pairs where reported=allowed but draft suggests block.
en.rule_r05_rec: Review these workload pairs before provisioning draft rules. Currently-allowed traffic will be blocked once the draft is provisioned.

zh_TW.event_tips_agent_activate: VEN 成功配對至 PCE 並納入管理。搭配 agent.deactivate 追蹤工作負載生命週期；使用 status=success 或 status=failure 可偵測配對失敗。
zh_TW.event_tips_agent_clone_detected: PCE 偵測到具有重複身份的 VEN（主機複製場景）。需立即調查——可能代表未授權複製。搭配 agent.activate_clone 可查看複製體啟動情形。
zh_TW.event_tips_agent_deactivate: VEN 從 PCE 管理中移除（解除配對或下線）。搭配 agent.activate 追蹤生命週期，並搭配 workloads.unpair 觀察工作負載層級的對應事件。
zh_TW.event_tips_agent_goodbye: VEN 在關機或重啟前主動發送的斷線通知。搭配 agent.service_not_available 可區分正常關機與異常中斷——若此事件前未出現 goodbye，表示發生異常中斷。
zh_TW.event_tips_agent_refresh_policy: VEN 從 PCE 拉取最新 Policy。佈建期間觸發頻率較高，正常狀態下可用嚴重性過濾器降噪。無子事件。
zh_TW.event_tips_agent_service_not_available: VEN 無法連線（崩潰、主機關閉、網路中斷）。搭配 agent.goodbye 觀察——若此事件前未出現 goodbye，表示發生異常中斷。無子事件。
zh_TW.event_tips_agent_suspend: 工作負載的 Enforcement 已暫停，Policy 規則不再套用。處於暫停狀態的工作負載接受所有流量，建議設定警示。可搭配 agent.activate 及 agent.deactivate 了解生命週期。
zh_TW.event_tips_agent_tampering: VEN 二進位檔或設定檔在未授權情況下被修改（完整性違規）。建議設為高優先警示——此事件為資安事件的指標。無子事件，無需狀態／嚴重性過濾器。
zh_TW.event_tips_all: 匹配所有類型的事件，適合用作全覆蓋監控或測試。建議改用特定事件類型以減少雜訊；可透過分類或操作者進行更精確的篩選。
zh_TW.event_tips_api_key_create: 已發出新的 API 金鑰。高敏感性事件——未授權的金鑰建立將賦予持久性 API 存取權。搭配 api_key.delete 追蹤金鑰生命週期；按操作者過濾可追蹤發出金鑰的人員。
zh_TW.event_tips_api_key_delete: 已撤銷 API 金鑰。搭配 api_key.create 追蹤完整金鑰生命週期。意外刪除（尤其是服務帳號金鑰）可能表示帳號被接管或蓄意破壞。
zh_TW.event_tips_cluster_update: PCE 叢集設定已修改，在正常狀態下不常見。對意外變更設定警示；無子事件。使用進階條件的操作者欄位追蹤變更者。
zh_TW.event_tips_enforcement_boundary_create: 已建立 Enforcement Boundary（選擇性執行模式的拒絕規則）。佈建後影響範圍內的所有工作負載。對意外建立設定警示；搭配 enforcement_boundary.delete 追蹤生命週期。
zh_TW.event_tips_enforcement_boundary_delete: Enforcement Boundary 已被移除——移除後會擴展選擇性執行的覆蓋範圍。對生產環境中的刪除設定警示；搭配 enforcement_boundary.create 追蹤生命週期。
zh_TW.event_tips_firewall_settings_update: PCE 全域防火牆設定已變更（如記錄模式、預設拒絕規則）。高影響性事件，變更套用至整個系統。無子事件及相關生命週期事件。對任何意外變更設定警示。
zh_TW.event_tips_lost_agent_found: 先前無法連線的 VEN 已重新連線，通常在 agent.service_not_available 之後出現。可用於關閉事件告警。嚴重性為資訊級（復原事件），無子事件。
zh_TW.event_tips_nen_degraded: NEN 處於降級狀態，可能無法正確執行 Policy，為 network_enforcement_node.missed_heartbeats 的升級事件。需立即採取行動——網路裝置可能在未套用最新 Policy 的情況下運作。
zh_TW.event_tips_nen_missed_heartbeats: NEN 遺漏了預期的心跳信號，是完全降級前的早期預警。搭配 network_enforcement_node.degraded 追蹤進程；提早警示以預防網路裝置上的 Policy 執行失敗。
zh_TW.event_tips_request_authentication_failed: API 或 UI 身份驗證嘗試被拒絕（憑證無效、Token 過期、API 金鑰遺失）。按操作者 IP 過濾可偵測暴力破解。搭配 user.authenticate 取得完整身份驗證狀況。
zh_TW.event_tips_request_authorization_failed: 已驗證身份的使用者嘗試存取超出其角色權限的資源或執行操作。對反覆失敗設定警示——可能表示權限提升嘗試。無子事件。
zh_TW.event_tips_rule_set_create: 已建立新的 Rule Set。變更只有在 sec_policy.create（佈建）後才生效。搭配 rule_set.update 和 rule_set.delete 追蹤完整 Policy 生命週期；監控操作者以防未授權的 Policy 編寫。
zh_TW.event_tips_rule_set_delete: Rule Set 已被刪除，佈建後無法復原。對意外刪除設定警示——此操作會移除安全規則的邏輯分組。搭配 rule_set.create 和 rule_set.update 追蹤完整生命週期。
zh_TW.event_tips_rule_set_update: 現有 Rule Set 已被修改。變更為草稿狀態，需透過 sec_policy.create 佈建後才生效。搭配 rule_set.create 和 rule_set.delete；使用 status=failure 捕捉失敗的更新。
zh_TW.event_tips_sec_policy_create: 新 Policy 版本已佈建並推送至所有 VEN——即「提交」事件，所有先前的規則及 Rule Set 變更在此生效。對意外佈建（非工作時間、未知操作者）設定警示。無子事件。
zh_TW.event_tips_sec_rule_create: 在 Rule Set 中建立了個別安全規則，為草稿狀態，需佈建後才生效。搭配 sec_rule.update、sec_rule.delete，以及 sec_policy.create 佈建觸發器使用。
zh_TW.event_tips_sec_rule_delete: 個別安全規則已被刪除——刪除規則會在佈建後擴展允許的流量。請同時監控對應的 sec_policy.create 以掌握刪除何時生效。
zh_TW.event_tips_sec_rule_update: 現有安全規則已被修改，為草稿狀態，需佈建後才生效。搭配 sec_rule.create 和 sec_rule.delete；使用 status=failure 偵測編寫錯誤或權限問題。
zh_TW.event_tips_system_task_agent_missed_hear: PCE 排程檢查發現 VEN 遺漏了預期的心跳信號，是完全斷線的前兆指標。搭配 system_task.agent_offline_check 追蹤從遺漏心跳到離線的進程。
zh_TW.event_tips_system_task_agent_offline_che: PCE 排程檢查確認 VEN 已離線，比 system_task.agent_missed_heartbeats_check 更具確定性。在此設定 SLA 影響的警示，並用 missed_heartbeats 作為早期預警。
zh_TW.event_tips_user_authenticate: 涵蓋所有身份驗證嘗試（成功與失敗）。透過 status=failure 篩選可偵測暴力破解。搭配 user.sign_in（僅在成功時觸發）和 request.authentication_failed（API 層級失敗）使用。
zh_TW.event_tips_user_login_session_terminated: 工作階段因逾時或管理員撤銷而結束，並非主動登出。對管理員撤銷的工作階段設定警示以提高安全可見性。搭配 user.sign_out 區分主動與強制終止。
zh_TW.event_tips_user_pce_session_terminated: PCE 伺服器終止了工作階段（如 PCE 重啟、維護）。與使用者主動登出不同，無子事件。在維護期間或 PCE 意外重啟時監控。
zh_TW.event_tips_user_sign_in: 僅在主控台或 API 成功登入時觸發。失敗嘗試請使用帶 status=failure 的 user.authenticate 或 request.authentication_failed。搭配 user.sign_out 和 user.login_session_terminated 追蹤完整工作階段。
zh_TW.event_tips_user_sign_out: 使用者主動登出 PCE。搭配 user.sign_in 追蹤工作階段生命週期。可與 user.login_session_terminated（逾時或管理員撤銷）和 user.pce_session_terminated（伺服器端終止）區分。
zh_TW.event_tips_workloads_unpair: 一個或多個工作負載已從 PCE 取消管理（VEN 已移除），通常伴隨 agent.deactivate。對批量解除配對設定警示（高數量）——可能表示設定錯誤或未授權下線。

zh_TW.rpt_guidance_audit_mod03_actions: 確認變更與核准工單綁定；調查異常的操作者或時間點。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_audit_mod03_how: 每一列是一個變更事件，包含操作者、時間和目標。依操作者或規則集分群以發現模式。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_audit_mod03_purpose: 追蹤跨規則集的政策變更與生命週期事件。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_audit_mod03_signals: 非上班時間的變更、大量刪除、未授權操作者、政策異動激增。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_audit_mod04_actions: 建立 IR 工單；拉取完整 PCE 審計日誌；以 VEN 遙測驗證。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_audit_mod04_how: 關聯鏈是時間窗口內共享操作者或工作負載的多事件序列。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_audit_mod04_purpose: 將可疑事件與政策變更、VEN 活動關聯，揭示可調查的故事線。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_audit_mod04_signals: 認證失敗 → 政策變更鏈；agent 竄改 → 流量異常；大量刪除 → blocked 流量激增。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod02_actions: 為合法的 PB 流量建立 allow 規則；針對 blocked 流量調查攻擊者行為或設定錯誤。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod02_how: 比較 allowed 與 PB 的比例。PB 不代表有 staged 規則——而是沒有對應的 allow 規則，只有視覺化模式隱藏了封鎖。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod02_purpose: 依政策決策（allow / block / potentially blocked）分析觀察到的流量分布，並依 profile 區隔。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod02_signals: potentially_blocked 比例高表示存在覆蓋缺口；blocked 比例高代表有嘗試存取被拒絕的流量。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod03_actions: 建立候選 allow 規則；接受 default-deny 的影響；或針對可疑流量展開調查。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod03_how: 每一列代表缺乏覆蓋的標籤對或 port。流量愈高、目的地愈關鍵，修復優先度愈高。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod03_purpose: 找出沒有對應 allow 規則、在 default-deny 執行模式下將被封鎖的流量。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod03_signals: PB 未覆蓋流量數量高；流向 crown-jewel 標籤的流量；來自未納管來源的流量。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod04_actions: 隔離或限制；將合法管理流量轉為具名 allow 規則；對其餘流量展開調查。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod04_how: 每一列代表使用高風險埠口的工作負載組合。若不在允許的管理工具基準中，應標記。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod04_purpose: 識別勒索軟體相關埠口與協議（SMB/RDP/SSH 等）的暴露風險。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod04_signals: 來自網際網路或未納管來源、連向關鍵埠口目的地的流量。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod07_actions: 將合法格子轉換為標籤型 allow 規則；調查非預期的高流量交叉。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod07_how: 橫向閱讀 = 來源群組，縱向 = 目的群組。格子深淺反映流量大小。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod07_purpose: 將來源標籤 → 目的標籤 → 服務交叉點對應，揭示相依性結構。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod07_signals: 非預期的環境交叉（prod ↔ dev）、未知標籤、缺乏理由的應用程式組合。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod08_actions: 可行時安裝 VEN；記錄並接受例外情況；針對未納管對等主機收緊邊界規則。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod08_how: 每一列代表一個未納管 IP 及其觀察到的對等主機、埠口和標籤。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod08_purpose: 列出參與觀察流量、但尚未安裝 VEN 的未納管主機。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod08_signals: 未納管來源存取 crown-jewel 應用；高流量未納管外出流量；關鍵環境中的未納管對等主機。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod13_actions: 將 PB 轉換為具名 allow；解決未納管相依性；之後推進應用到 selective enforcement。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod13_how: PB 數量愈高 = 將被封鎖的流量愈多。有具名規則的 allowed 比例愈高 = 準備度愈高。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod13_purpose: 評估每個應用/環境的執行準備度：轉換為 default-deny 後，哪些流量會被阻擋、哪些會受到保護。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod13_signals: 可執行比例低；PB 暴露高；未納管相依性阻礙執行推進。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod15_actions: 透過 allow 規則或 boundary deny 切斷影響最大的跳點；隔離 crown jewel 系統。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod15_how: 路徑長度、埠口組合和敏感標籤間的交叉代表爆炸半徑風險。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod15_purpose: 顯示攻擊者在取得初始立足點後，可能橫向移動的東西向路徑。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod15_signals: 跨越多個環境的長路徑鏈；充滿 PB 的跳點；高風險埠口鏈（SMB/RDP）。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod_change_impact_actions: 調查退步項目；記錄改善；與稽核政策變更關聯。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod_change_impact_how: 每個 KPI 顯示前次與本次數值及方向（改善／退步／不變）。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod_change_impact_purpose: 顯示關鍵風險指標自前次報告以來的變化。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod_change_impact_signals: PB 暴露或橫向路徑大幅退步；或近期政策變更後的改善。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod_draft_actions_actions: 審查有效允許規則與覆寫拒絕邊界；視需要收緊或移除。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod_draft_actions_how: Override Deny：目前政策 Allow 但草稿會封鎖。跨邊界 Allow：跨環境邊界的流量。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod_draft_actions_purpose: 找出草稿政策決策需要人工審查或修復的流量。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod_draft_actions_signals: 任何 override_deny 或 allowed_across_boundary 流量 — 代表政策意圖缺口。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod_ringfence_actions: 建立候選允許規則；為跨環境例外新增邊界拒絕；解決非受管依賴關係。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod_ringfence_how: 每條候選規則為 src_label → dst_label → 通訊埠三元組，可直接審查。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod_ringfence_purpose: 對應每個應用程式的依賴關係，並提出標籤式圍欄規則建議。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_mod_ringfence_signals: 缺少允許規則的高跨應用程式或跨環境流量；依賴關係中的未知標籤。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_pu_mod03_actions: 停用後經驗證期再移除；若需要則替換為更嚴格的規則。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_pu_mod03_how: 每一列是一條規則，包含最後命中時間戳和查詢窗口內的命中次數。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_pu_mod03_purpose: 識別從未命中（零命中）的政策規則，作為清理候選。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_pu_mod03_signals: 超過 30 天未使用的規則；範圍過寬但零命中的規則（過度允許但無效）。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_pu_mod04_actions: 收緊規則範圍；移除多餘的 Deny；調查繞過行為。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_pu_mod04_how: 有效比例 = blocked 流量符合 Deny 範圍 / 範圍內的總流量。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_pu_mod04_purpose: 量化 Deny 規則的效果：實際封鎖的流量與預期範圍的對比。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_pu_mod04_signals: 零命中的 Deny 規則（可能多餘）；被繞過的 Deny 規則（有效比例低）。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_ven_lost_heartbeat_actions: 檢查 VEN 與 PCE 的連線；重啟 VEN 服務；若關鍵工作負載受影響則升級處理。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_ven_lost_heartbeat_how: < 24 小時：可能是暫時性的。24–48 小時：需要調查。時長與關鍵性決定緊迫程度。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_ven_lost_heartbeat_purpose: 識別近期失去聯繫但可能仍可恢復的 VEN。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_ven_lost_heartbeat_signals: 相同時間窗口內多個 VEN 失聯；關鍵工作負載受影響；反覆出現的模式。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_ven_offline_actions: 重啟 VEN 或重新加入；若持續，將工作負載標記為未納管以進行政策規劃。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_ven_offline_how: 離線 = 超過心跳閾值無聯繫。< 24 小時失聯可恢復；> 48 小時需要介入。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_ven_offline_purpose: 列出離線或近期失去心跳的 VEN——這些是分割盲點。
zh_TW.rpt_guidance_ven_offline_signals: 關鍵工作負載上的離線 VEN；長時間失去心跳；叢集式離線故障。
zh_TW.rpt_no_findings: 本次分析沒有發現需要特別關注的重點。
zh_TW.rpt_no_findings_detail: 這批資料沒有觸發任何安全發現，通常代表 Policy 覆蓋狀況良好，或目前的門檻設定較保守。

zh_TW.rpt_no_matrix: 沒有 Label 矩陣資料。
zh_TW.rpt_no_user_proc: 沒有使用者或程序資料。
zh_TW.rpt_pb_explainer: 在視覺化模式下觀察到、但無對應 allow 規則的流量；切換到 selective/full enforcement 後將被預設拒絕。

zh_TW.rpt_pu_caveat_body: 在本次分析區間內沒有流量命中的 Rules，仍可能在更早的 retention 區間外有歷史命中紀錄，移除前請再確認。

zh_TW.rpt_pu_no_hit_rules: 此期間沒有任何規則被命中。
zh_TW.rpt_pu_no_unused_rules: 所有規則都有流量命中，沒有發現未使用的規則。
zh_TW.rpt_pu_unused_caveat: 此處列出的 Rules 在所選回溯區間內沒有觀測到流量命中。這不代表可以直接安全移除，因為 PCE 流量 retention 區間、低頻 Workload 或例外 failover 路徑可能隱藏了實際使用紀錄。
zh_TW.rpt_rule_b003_desc: 偵測嘗試建立與最小權限基準衝突的廣泛範圍 allow 規則。
zh_TW.rpt_rule_l008_desc: 偵測橫向移動候選：透過高風險埠口跨越信任邊界的路徑鏈。
zh_TW.rpt_rules_findings: 規則分析發現 {count} 個項目。
zh_TW.rpt_tr_allowed_lateral: 明確 Allowed 的 lateral 流量（高風險）
zh_TW.rpt_tr_anomalies_note: 此區塊列出每條連線的平均傳輸量高於資料集 P95 門檻的流量，並排除單次偶發連線，用於快速找出異常高傳輸模式。
zh_TW.rpt_tr_col_factor_desc: 此欄為 Enforcement 就緒度的評估面向
zh_TW.rpt_tr_col_ratio_desc: 底層量測數值（例如：60% 的流量已有 Policy 覆蓋）
zh_TW.rpt_tr_col_score_desc: 該因子的實際得分（= 權重 × 比率 ÷ 100），所有因子加總為總分
zh_TW.rpt_tr_col_weight_desc: 此因子在 100 分總分中的佔比（例如 35 = 佔 35%）
zh_TW.rpt_tr_fan_out: Fan-out 來源（疑似掃描器 / Worm）

zh_TW.rule_b001_rec_critical_cross_env: 嚴重警告：偵測到跨環境的高風險 Port 流量且有明確的 allow 規則。請立即移除或嚴格收斂這些 allow 規則。未經文件化例外審批，任何跨環境流量都不應被允許使用 lateral movement Port。涉及 Port：{named_ports}。
zh_TW.rule_b001_rec_cross_subnet_allowed: {named_ports} 上的跨子網路流量顯示存在範圍過大的管理員存取或潛在的橫向移動。請將 allow 規則限制為：(1) 僅授權的跳板機 / bastion IP，(2) 特定管理 VLAN 範圍。同子網路流量（{n_same_subnet} 筆）可能是合法的 Windows 管理流量——請驗證來源 IP 並相應調整規則範圍。
zh_TW.rule_b001_rec_cross_subnet_pb: 高風險 Port 上的跨子網路流量沒有 allow 規則（potentially_blocked）——沒有任何 Policy 覆蓋這些路徑，它們之所以能通過僅因為 VEN 在 test 模式。請將目的端 Workloads 切換至 selective 或 full enforcement 以啟用 default-deny。
zh_TW.rule_b001_rec_pb_cross_env: 嚴重警告：偵測到跨環境流量但沒有 allow 規則（potentially_blocked）。目前沒有任何 Policy 允許這些流量——它們之所以能通過，僅因為 Workloads 仍在 test 模式。請立即將 Workloads 切換至 enforced 模式以啟用 default-deny 阻斷這些路徑，並調查為何這些跨環境流量存在於：{named_ports}。
zh_TW.rule_b001_rec_same_subnet_allowed: 高風險 Port 上的同子網路流量是典型的 Windows 伺服器管理流量（對鄰近伺服器的 RDP、SMB 檔案共享、WinRM 遠端管理）。建議操作：(1) 驗證每個來源 IP 是授權的管理員系統或跳板機，(2) 將 Illumio allow 規則範圍限制到特定來源 IP 而非允許全子網路存取，(3) 確認 SMB 445 和 RPC 135 沒有被用於工作負載間的一般檔案共享。
zh_TW.rule_b001_rec_same_subnet_pb: 高風險 Port 上的同子網路流量且僅在 test 模式下。立即風險偏低——請驗證來源 IP 是授權的管理員系統，然後將 Workloads 切換至 enforced 模式。考慮將 allow 規則範圍縮小至特定管理員 IP 而非整個子網路。
zh_TW.rule_b002_rec: 1) 確認每個允許的流量都有書面的業務理由。2) 除非特定管理工作流程需要，否則封鎖 TeamViewer (5938) 和 VNC (5900/5901) ——改用具 MFA 保護的跳板機。3) 若 NetBIOS (137-139) 被允許，請遷移至使用加密的 SMBv3 over 445。4) 為非管理員 Workloads 對這些 Port 建立 Illumio deny 規則。
zh_TW.rule_b003_rec: 1) 優先將有 potentially_blocked 流量的 Workloads 切換至 enforced 模式——從最高風險 Port（SSH、NFS）開始。2) 審查 'potentially_blocked' 流量，確認套用 enforcement 後沒有合法流量會中斷。3) 切換至 enforced 模式前，先為已驗證的合法流量建立 allow 規則。4) 設定 enforcement 期限——長期 test 模式會讓網路持續曝露風險。
zh_TW.rule_b004_rec: 1) 識別每個 unmanaged 來源 IP——是網路設備、舊系統還是 shadow IT？2) 在應受管控的伺服器上部署 VEN agent。3) 對無法安裝 VEN 的網路設備，使用 IP list 和 enforcement boundary 控制其存取。4) 為任何非必要的 unmanaged→managed 路徑建立明確的 deny 規則。
zh_TW.rule_b005_rec: 1) 優先處理關鍵層級：資料庫、身份識別基礎設施（AD/LDAP）和對外的 Workloads。2) 使用 Illumio Explorer 找出最多未受規則覆蓋的流量，並為已驗證的流量建立 allow 規則。3) 設定 30 天內達到 >{threshold}% 覆蓋率的目標。4) 逐步啟用 enforcement——從圍欄高價值資產開始，再擴展至一般 Workloads。
zh_TW.rule_b006_rec_allowed: 1) 調查排名最高的來源 IP——檢查是否有攻擊工具、異常 SSH session 或 RDP 暴力破解。2) 移除或嚴格收斂導致高扇出的 allow 規則。3) 圍欄高價值資產（資料庫、網域控制器）以限制爆炸半徑。
zh_TW.rule_b006_rec_pb: 1) 調查排名最高的來源 IP——檢查是否有攻擊工具、異常 SSH session 或 RDP 暴力破解。2) 將 Workloads 切換至 enforced 模式——這些路徑沒有 allow 規則，套用 enforcement 後 default-deny 將封鎖它們。3) 圍欄高價值資產（資料庫、網域控制器）以限制爆炸半徑。
zh_TW.rule_b007_rec: 1) 與 HR/IT 記錄交叉比對被標記的帳號——這些是管理員帳號還是一般使用者？2) 檢查驗證日誌中的登入失敗或不可能的地理位置警報。3) 對管理員帳號，強制執行 JIT 存取和 MFA 進行橫向 session。4) 建立 Illumio 使用者型規則以限制每個角色可存取的目的地。5) 若懷疑被入侵，立即輪換憑證並隔離工作負載。
zh_TW.rule_b008_rec: 1) 驗證頻寬最高的來源——是備份伺服器、複寫還是資料庫同步？記錄預期的高流量。2) 對無法解釋的傳輸，檢查來源是否為正在向外部或橫向目的地洩漏資料的被入侵 Workload。3) 考慮為已知高流量服務實施頻寬感知規則或 QoS 策略。4) 設定 Illumio 監控警報以偵測持續異常的流量。
zh_TW.rule_b009_rec: 1) 稽核每個跨環境流量配對——記錄哪些是預期的（例如 Production 監控從 Staging 拉取資料）。2) 為已核准的跨環境路徑建立具特定 Port 限制的明確 Illumio 規則。3) 封鎖所有其他跨環境流量，特別是資料庫 Port（見 L004）和管理協定（SSH、RDP）。4) 一致使用 Illumio 環境 Label 以強制執行隔離 boundary。
zh_TW.rule_bulk_unpair: 批次 Workload 取消配對
zh_TW.rule_high_blocked_desc: 偵測到大量被封鎖的流量。
zh_TW.rule_high_blocked_rec: 請查看排行最高的封鎖流量，確認 Policy 是否需要調整。
zh_TW.rule_l001_rec: 立即停用 Telnet (port 23) 和 FTP (ports 20/21)，改用 SSH (22) 或 SFTP。明文憑證可被任何有網路存取權的攻擊者擷取，讓橫向移動變得輕而易舉。
zh_TW.rule_l002_rec: 在分段層封鎖 NetBIOS (137-138)、LLMNR (5355) 和 SSDP (1900)。這些協定在現代微分段環境中沒有合法用途，幾乎專門被用於網路偵查和憑證毒化攻擊（例如 Responder / Inveigh）。
zh_TW.rule_l003_rec: 資料庫 Port 應只能從直接的應用程式層（通常 1-2 個 app label）存取。使用 Illumio 規則集將資料庫存取限制為僅核准的 app label。廣泛的資料庫曝露是橫向移動成功後的主要資料外洩路徑。
zh_TW.rule_l004_rec: 對所有資料庫 Port 強制執行嚴格的環境隔離。任何 Dev/Test/Staging 應用程式都不應直接存取 Production 資料庫。使用讀取副本或 API gateway 作為跨環境介面，而非直接資料庫 Port。
zh_TW.rule_l005_rec_allowed: 將 Kerberos (88) 和 LDAP (389/636) 限制為僅網域加入的 Workloads 可存取。移除或嚴格收斂允許廣泛身份 Port 存取的 allow 規則。任何應用程式層都不應直接查詢 LDAP——使用服務帳號封裝。
zh_TW.rule_l005_rec_pb: 這些流量沒有 allow 規則——將 Workloads 切換至 enforced 模式以讓 default-deny 封鎖它們。執行 enforcement 前，僅為合法的 LDAP 使用者（網域加入的 Workloads）建立 allow 規則。任何應用程式層都不應直接查詢 LDAP——使用服務帳號封裝。
zh_TW.rule_l006_rec: 使用 Illumio 規則集減少應用程式層間的 lateral Port 連接。每個應用程式應只能到達其直接依賴——而非透過傳遞連接到達整個網路。優先隔離 evidence 中列出的高危 pivot 應用程式。
zh_TW.rule_l007_rec: Unmanaged 主機絕對不應直接到達資料庫、身份識別或 Windows 管理 Port。選項：(1) 立即將主機加入 PCE，(2) 為 unmanaged 來源對這些 Port 新增明確的 deny 規則，(3) 調查這些是否為攻擊者控制的主機或 shadow IT。優先確認最高來源 IP 為已知/授權的資產。
zh_TW.rule_l008_rec: 將 Workloads 從 visibility/test 模式切換至 selective 或 full enforcement。在 enforcement 啟用前，'potentially_blocked' 流量是真實的攻擊路徑——沒有 allow 規則覆蓋，只有 enforced 模式的 default-deny 才能封鎖它們。請在 PCE 中確認目的端應用程式的 enforcement 模式：{top_apps}。
zh_TW.rule_l009_rec: 調查所有超過閾值的 managed→unmanaged 對外流量。合法的對外流量（網際網路 API、CDN）應明確允許並限制在已知目的 IP 或範圍。套用對外允許清單 Policy 並拒絕所有其他外部目的地。最高可疑目的地（依傳輸量）：{top_dst_fmt}。
zh_TW.rule_l010_rec: 嚴重警告：Lateral movement Port（SMB 445、RDP 3389、WinRM 5985/5986、RPC 135）絕對不能跨環境 boundary 被允許。請立即在環境 boundary 層實施 deny 規則。這代表一條跨環境的活躍橫向移動路徑，攻擊者可利用它從低安全性區域提升至高安全性區域。
zh_TW.rule_overwritten: 規則已存在，已改為更新設定。
zh_TW.rule_pce_health_rec: 請確認 PCE 服務狀態與網路連線。
zh_TW.rule_r01_desc: 目前被允許的流量，一旦 draft deny 規則 provision 後將被封鎖。
zh_TW.rule_r01_name: 偵測到 Draft Deny 規則
zh_TW.rule_r01_rec: 請審查並佈建 draft deny 規則，或在佈建前新增明確的 allow 規則，以避免流量意外中斷。
zh_TW.rule_r02_desc: 存在 Override Deny 規則；任何 allow 規則都無法覆蓋。
zh_TW.rule_r02_rec: Override deny 規則的優先權高於所有 allow 規則，請在佈建前確認每一條 override deny 都是有意為之。
zh_TW.rule_r03_desc: VEN 處於 visibility/test 模式且此流量有 deny boundary draft。
zh_TW.rule_r03_name: Visibility 模式 Boundary 突破
zh_TW.rule_r03_rec: 請將 Workloads 切換至 enforced 模式以啟用 boundary deny。目前這些流量之所以可以通過，僅因為 VEN 仍在 test/visibility 模式。
zh_TW.rule_r04_desc: Allow 規則覆蓋了 regular deny，請確認是否為預期行為。
zh_TW.rule_r04_rec: 請確認跨 boundary 的 allow 規則確為必要且範圍已收斂，並評估是否有更嚴格的規則可以達成相同業務需求。
zh_TW.rule_r05_desc: 彙整 reported=allowed 但 draft 顯示會被封鎖的 workload pair 清單。
zh_TW.rule_r05_name: Draft 與 Reported 不一致
zh_TW.rule_r05_rec: 請在佈建 draft 規則前審查這些 Workload 配對。目前允許的流量一旦 draft 佈建後將被封鎖。
